title: Mary Ogden
compiled_truth: Mary Ogden is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-02-19 to 2002-04-08), Mary Ogden sent 58 and received 494 emails, totalling 552 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (48), [T  Hodge](people/t-hodge) (10), [Steve Van](people/steve-van) (7), [N  Gray](people/n-gray) (6), [Carlos Sole](people/carlos-sole) (6).
